name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package semisweet chocolate chips (6 ounce) (about 1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Butter and flour a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
3. Sift flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt into a medium bowl.
4. Beat sugar, butter, and oil in a large bowl until well blended.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Beat in vanilla extract.
7. Mix in dry ingredients alternately with buttermilk (3 additions each).
8. Mix in grated zucchini.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan.
10. Sprinkle chocolate chips and nuts over the top.
11. Bake cake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 50 minutes.
12. Cool cake completely in the pan.
12 Servings
Bon Appetit
November 1995
